features.name: partitioned register array with per-mask-bit write enable
features.description: Code should include a memory simulation model where the data array is partitioned into one register per mask bit, and each register partition is independently write-enabled by the corresponding single bit of a multi-bit write mask

features.name: mask granularity parameterized part-select on write data
features.description: Code should include a parameterized part-select expression that extracts mask-granularity-sized slices from a write data bus, where the slice index is computed as i*granularity and width equals dataWidth/maskWidth

features.name: concatenated read data from mask-partitioned register sub-arrays
features.description: Code should include a read path that gathers one granule-sized slice from each mask-partition register array at the same address, then concatenates all slices into the full-width output word
